tracks.name: M0 Class
tracks.headline: Tiny control-plane cores and microcontroller-class SoCs.
tracks.target: Sky130/ASAP7 RTL-to-GDS runs with hidden functional tests and signoff PPA.

entries.note: Seed submission from the PPAbench repository. It demonstrates the submission format; the local host lacked the EDA toolchain, so grading stopped at tier 0.

tracks.name: Display Pipeline Class
tracks.headline: Raster timing, DMA, FIFOs, scanout, and compositing pipelines.
tracks.target: Correct pixels first, then signed-off power, frame timing, and silicon area.

tracks.name: AI Matrix Multiplication Class
tracks.headline: MAC arrays, systolic dataflows, SRAM movement, and accelerator control.
tracks.target: Hidden matrix workloads scored with signoff PPA and deterministic correctness.
